Container.Name: soft-serve
Container.Overview: Soft Serve is a self-hosted, user-configurable Git server for the command line. It serves your repositories over SSH and displays a beautiful terminal user interface (TUI) when you log in. Note: This is a third-party community template and is not an official XML file from the application developers.

Config.Name: SSH Port
Config.Description: SSH Port to access the terminal user interface (TUI) and run git operations.

Config.Name: HTTP Port
Config.Description: HTTP Port used for HTTP-based git cloning and webhooks.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Path to store repositories, keys, and server configurations.
